Text.Page:
, I need to get a sense of the troops. What's their morale? What troubles them?

The problem is, if I ask, they might not speak the truth. If you asked, on the other hand...
Things aren't too bad. I'm not happy about those filthy mekonaris, but our forces can handle them.

Well, I'd feel a lot safer if someone would kill those awful fangspawns.

Other than that, though, I'm managing.

I just hope the princesses stop feuding.

Honestly, things could be better. The reports from the Eldritch Academy chill my blood.

Still, I'd say we're in good shape.

Well, nothing's ever perfect, but I'm pleased with what you found.

Excellent work, . Carry on.
